creator: naddy@mips.rhein-neckar.de
text:
The sysutils/star port relies on the convoluted original build
procedure as provided by the author of star. This has the unfortunate
side effect that the port won't build on alpha (easy to fix) and
doesn't honor any build variables such as CFLAGS (more difficult).

I'm looking into fixing this port properly. Until then, I suggest that
the current brokenness be marked in the makefile.
